title: Imouto wa Shitteiru
titleNative: 妹は知っている
synopsis: At work, Kiichiro Miki is an ordinary salaryman who is considered expressionless and dull by his co-workers. He floats around at drinking parties and doesn't seem to be having any fun at all. But only I, his younger sister, knows the truth about him. My brother is actually “the most interesting man in the world." (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Mobile Suit Gundam SEED ECLIPSE
titleNative: 機動戦士ガンダムSEED ECLIPSE
synopsis: C.E. 72 was a unique era which would later be called the "two blank years." Some also called it "the time of peace on thin ice," and others call it "the break before the oncoming frenzy." This is the story of an interval. A story that takes place between two large wars in which members of a hollow unit known as ODR risked their lives.

titleNative: ルエント幻獣調整師
synopsis: Luent, the world of illusion, is a world ruled by beastmen and inhabited by mythical beasts. A wandering mythical beast trimmer, Balm, and his comrades go on a journey to find the mother of a new species of young mythical beast, Poro! A slightly scary fantasy! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: My Wandering Warrior Existence
titleNative: 迷走戦士・永田カビ
synonyms: Diario di una guerriera single - Il mio matrimonio con me stessa
synopsis: The newest diary manga from the Harvey Award-winning creator of My Lesbian Experience with Loneliness. Nagata Kabi’s groundbreaking autobiographical work has captivated audiences around the globe, starting with the viral online comic about identity that would become the graphic novel My Lesbian Experience with Loneliness . Readers from all backgrounds have been moved by the author’s ability to capture complex emotions through her art and text, giving insight into feelings they may have struggled to articulate themselves. Nagata Kabi’s memoirs, including the Eisner-nominated My Solo Exchange Diary and new release My Alcoholic Escape From Reality , have explored themes of physical and mental illness, sex and sexuality, family, and independence. Follow the newest installment of this trailblazing series with My Wandering Warrior Existence , Nagata Kabi’s exploration of longing for love and marriage. (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment) Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: Neoman Boindan Mariya
titleNative: 너만 보인단 말이야
synonyms: You’re the Only One I Can See
synopsis: Following the advice of his imaginary friend Jason, who told him, "Treat all girls like stones," Park Jin-yong starts seeing every girl as a stone. But then Sunwoo, a female student who doesn’t look like a stone, appears before him, and for the first time in five years, the sight of a girl’s face sends Jinyong’s happy little circuits into overdrive... (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Flunk Punk Rumble
titleNative: ヤンキー君とメガネちゃん
synonyms: The Yankee Boy and Glasses Girl
synopsis: Shinagawa Daichi is a high school delinquent who just wants to be left alone. However, class rep Adachi Hana will stop at nothing to get him to go on the upcoming Social Studies field trip. What are her true motives behind getting a "yankee" like Shinagawa to go on such a thing? Notes: - Includes 9 extra chapters. - Includes the one-shot "Fairy Megane" - Was licensed and published in English by Chuang Yi (based in Singapore)

title: Guuzou Jihen: Hato ni Himei wa Kikoenai
titleRomaji: Guuzou Jihen: Hato ni Himei wa Kikoenai
titleNative: 偶像事変~鳩に悲鳴は聞こえない~
synonyms: 偶像事變 ～鴿子聽不見悲鳴～
synopsis: Hiiragi Sera, the most popular idol in Japan, was seriously injured during a live performance, losing one of her legs to an explosive device. The whole country was outraged by the news. Because of the manner and brutality of the attack, everyone suspected Hitoya Ittaka, a boy who was caught several years earlier, when he was just 13, for a series of bombings that killed several hundred people. As the fans' "love" for Sera turns into "hatred," Japan itself is changed...... But what is the truth? (Source: Kodansha, translated)

titleNative: 孤児院テイマー

title: Akuyaku Reijou no Taida na Tameiki
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Reijou no Taida na Tameiki
titleNative: 悪役令嬢の怠惰な溜め息
synopsis: I was reincarnated as a villainess from an otome game I was playing. At this rate, I'll be exiled for being in the heroine’s way of conquering love. However, in this world… there are no entertainment materials! No doujinshis, no otome games, no smartphone! I'm really bored! Of course, I should be avoiding the destructive bad end… but before that I’m going to die from boredom! "If there's no entertainment, just create it!" Using the knowledge from my past life to create toys and romance novels, I'll make this boring world fun! After becoming the queen’s favorite entrepreneur, I thought this scenario change will bring me to my wonderful future… .but now the novel I wrote has brought me to the destruction flag--!?

title: My Isekai Life: I Gained a Second Character Class and Became the Strongest Sage in the World!
titleRomaji: Tensei Kenja no Isekai Life: Daini no Shokugyo wo Ete, Sekai Saikyou ni Narimashita
titleEnglish: My Isekai Life: I Gained a Second Character Class and Became the Strongest Sage in the World!
titleNative: 転生賢者の異世界ライフ ～第二の職業を得て、世界最強になりました～
synonyms: Tensei Kenja no Isekai Life: Dai-2 no Shokugyo wo Ete, Sekai Saikyou ni Narimashita
Mein Isekai-Leben – Mit der Hilfe von Schleimen zum mächtigsten Magier einer anderen Welt
เกิดใหม่ในต่างโลกเป็นปราชญ์แกร่งสุดโดยไม่รู้ตัว
Life as a Reincarnated Sage in Another World ~Gaining a Second Profession and Becoming the Strongest in the World~
synopsis: Whether at the office or at home, corporate drone Yuji Sano works all the time. So when his home PC flashes a message about him being summoned to another world, Yuji restarts his machine...only to find that he's inadvertently accepted the summons! Now in a fantasy world far removed from paperwork and computers, Yuji has just one thing on his mind: waking up from what he thinks is a dream and getting back to the mountain of work he left behind! But this other world has other plans for Yuji, who quickly discovers his Monster Tamer character class allows him to befriend slimes! And thanks to their number, those slimes help him absorb so much magical knowledge that he gains a second character class in the blink of an eye! How will Yuji wield his power now that he's the greatest sage the realm has ever known?! And what about all that paperwork?! (Source: Square Enix)

title: NINE PEAKS
titleNative: NINE PEAKS
synopsis: Gaku Mashio was a first-year high school student who lived with his father. He lost his father in a sudden accident, just as he got suspended from school after getting into a fight. On the night of his father's wake, Gaku went fishing on the shore in memory of his father, but he fell into the sea and was returned 22 years into the past. Gaku's father, Harumi, who was the same age as Gaku at that time, saved him from the water. Harumi's parents (Gaku's grandparents) took a liking to Gaku, and accepted him into their family under the name Gaku Miyagi. His grandparents even encouraged him to go to Seiha High School, same as his father. Twenty-two years ago, the town of Kurei was full of delinquents. Now Gaku and his father will fight their way to the top of the town! (Source: Shonen Champion, translated)

synopsis: "Please go out with me, with the intent of eventual marriage!" How will Sumire handle the unexpected proposal from her favorite actor Saki-kun? "I love you, but I'm just a fan. You can't be serious!?" As she spends time with Saki-kun every day, can Sumire avoid breaking the boundary between between idol and fan? It's a love comedy about a fan being pursued by her idol! searchTerms: 文豪ストレイドッグス

title: Futago Matomete "Kanojo" ni Shinai?
titleNative: 双子まとめて『カノジョ』にしない？
synopsis: Chikage is a beautiful girl in my class who is smart and well-behaved. She is my rival in school, but after school, she has another face. After school, she plays in the arcade with an innocent smile that would be unimaginable in class. I try to make friends with Chikage on campus and play with her after school in order to get to know her better at both places. We grow closer to each other, until finally… a heartwarming triangular love comedy begins! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

tags.name: Heterosexual
tags.description: Prominently features a romance between a man and a woman, not inherently sexual.

tags.name: Twins
tags.description: Prominently features two or more siblings that were born at one birth.

tags.name: Love Triangle
tags.description: Centered around romantic feelings between more than two people. Includes all love polygons.

tags.name: Polyamorous
tags.description: Features a character who is in a consenting relationship with multiple people at one time.

title: Ookami wa Tsuki ni Koi wo Suru
titleRomaji: Ookami wa Tsuki ni Koi wo Suru
titleNative: オオカミは月に恋をする
synopsis: Ryuna Kamikawa is the beautiful and perfect-acting student council president. When she gets angry at her lazy vice-president, Yugi Tsukiyama, he likes to tease her by calling "wolf-senpai." The two are like the light and dark sides of the moon, total opposites who don't get along. Until one day, when Tsukiyama discovers the hidden side of "Wolf Senpai" through his secret part-time job...? This is the start of a love story between two people with hidden identities! (Source: Ura Sunday, translated)
